Title: Cloudscape: A Study of Storage Services in Modern Cloud Architectures
Authors: Sambhav Satija; Chenhao Ye; Ranjitha Kosgi; Aditya Jain; Romit Kankaria; Yiwei Chen; Andrea C. Arpaci-Dusseau; Remzi H. Arpaci-Dusseau; Kiran Srinivasan
One-line Summary: Analyzes nearly 400 AWS cloud architectures to characterize how modern cloud systems compose storage services such as S3 and file systems.

Title: FlacIO: Flat and Collective I/O for Container Image Service
Authors: Yubo Liu; Hongbo Li; Mingrui Liu; Rui Jing; Jian Guo; Bo Zhang; Hanjun Guo; Yuxin Ren; Ning Jia
One-line Summary: Redesigns container image abstraction around runtime memory state to reduce I/O amplification and speed up image service.

Title: Revisiting Network Coding for Warm Blob Storage
Authors: Chuang Gan; Yuchong Hu; Leyan Zhao; Xin Zhao; Pengyu Gong; Dan Feng
One-line Summary: Builds NCBlob to use non-systematic MSR/network coding for warm blob storage, improving repair efficiency for small blobs.

Title: HiDPU: A DPU-Oriented Hybrid Indexing Scheme for Disaggregated Storage Systems
Authors: Wenbin Zhu; Zhaoyan Shen; Qian Wei; Renhai Chen; Xin Yao; Dongxiao Yu; Zili Shao
One-line Summary: Uses a DPU-oriented hybrid multi-level index to cut translation overhead and metadata memory cost in disaggregated storage.

Title: AegonKV: A High Bandwidth, Low Tail Latency, and Low Storage Cost KV-Separated LSM Store with SmartSSD-based GC Offloading
Authors: Zhuohui Duan; Hao Feng; Haikun Liu; Xiaofei Liao; Hai Jin; Bangyu Li
One-line Summary: Offloads GC to SmartSSD in a KV-separated LSM store to improve throughput, tail latency, and space efficiency together.

Title: Scalio: Scaling up DPU-based JBOF Key-value Store with NVMe-oF Target Offload
Authors: Xun Sun; Mingxing Zhang; Yingdi Shan; Kang Chen; Jinlei Jiang; Yongwei Wu
One-line Summary: Scales DPU-based JBOF KV storage by offloading SSD I/O through NVMe-oF target offload and RDMA-based consistency control.

Title: Stripeless Data Placement for Erasure-Coded In-Memory Storage
Authors: Jian Gao; Jiwu Shu; Bin Yan; Yuhao Zhang; Keji Huang
One-line Summary: Introduces stripeless erasure coding and a distributed in-memory KV store to avoid stripe overheads in fast in-memory storage.

Title: Okapi: Decoupling Data Striping and Redundancy Grouping in Cluster File Systems
Authors: Sanjith Athlur; Timothy Kim; Saurabh Kadekodi; Francisco Maturana; Xavier Ramos; Arif Merchant; K. V. Rashmi; Gregory R. Ganger
One-line Summary: Decouples striping from redundancy grouping so cluster file systems can optimize performance and durability independently.

Title: Mantle: Efficient Hierarchical Metadata Management for Cloud Object Storage Services
Authors: Jiahao Li; Biao Cao; Jielong Jian; Cheng Li; Sen Han; Yiduo Wang; Yufei Wu; Kang Chen; Zhihui Yin; Qiushi Chen; Jiwei Xiong; Jie Zhao; Fengyuan Liu; Yan Xing; Liguo Duan; Miao Yu; Ran Zheng; Feng Wu; Xianjun Meng
One-line Summary: Improves hierarchical metadata management for cloud object storage services to better scale namespace and metadata operations.
